name: Gold Tone Ribbed Triangle Stud Earrings
description: Make a bold statement with these gold-tone ribbed triangle stud earrings. Featuring a chunky, textured knot design and a premium anti-tarnish finish, they add a touch of vintage-inspired glamour to any outfit.

media.alt_text: Model wearing bold gold tone ribbed triangle stud earrings

faqs.question: Are these earrings heavy?
faqs.answer: While they feature a bold, chunky design, they are crafted to be comfortably lightweight for all-day wear.

faqs.question: Will the gold finish fade?
faqs.answer: No, these earrings are treated with a durable anti-tarnish finish to ensure they maintain their brilliant shine.

meta_title: Gold Tone Ribbed Triangle Stud Earrings | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the bold Gold Tone Ribbed Triangle Stud Earrings. Featuring a vintage-inspired textured design and a lasting anti-tarnish finish for everyday glamour.
